doorClosers.label: ECO Newton TS-50
doorClosers.description: Standard door closer with mounting plate
features: ECOunity — two basic bodies cover all door dimensions
ECOclic — stainless steel cover prevents unauthorised access
ECOvalve — simple adjustment with Allen key

doorClosers.label: ECO Newton TS-62
doorClosers.description: Door closer with slide rail — accessible buildings specialist
doorClosers.accessibilityNote: Significantly reducing opening moment — approx 40% reduction from 2° to 60°. Ideal for clinics, care homes, schools.
features: ECOphysis — door closer and slide rail form one aluminium/stainless steel unit
ECOline — slide rail and closer flush when installed
Adjustable latching speed, closing speed, back-check and closing delay

slideRailOptions.label: GS H — height adjustable slide rail
GS HF — height adjustable with extended arm (+22mm)
